items.title: Kawhi Leonard is joining:
items.author: Keerthika Uthayakumar
items.body_excerpt:
Kawhi Leonard is joining:
- the 5th-best defence in the NBA, 2nd-best clutch defence
- the 2nd-youngest rotation in the 2026 playoffs (weighed by minutes, top-8)
- a top-10 halfcourt offence (99.4)
- a team that went from 26th to 15th in offensive rating with Ingram

items.title: If the Warriors get LeBron and AD, they’ll have at least *six* players selected for the 2018 All-Star Game — those two, plus Steph, Draymond, Horford, and Porzingis (didn’t play due to injury). Butler, presumably headed out for AD, also made it but didn’t play. 😆

items.author: Eric Koreen
items.body_excerpt:
2018: Raps get Kawhi Leonard for relative discount because rest of league terrified he's leaving for California in a year.

2026: Raps close to getting Kawhi Leonard  because he only wants to sign an extension in Toronto.

Hard to make this stuff up.

media.title: Sources: Raptors nearing deal to acquire Leonard from Clippers
media.description: The LA Clippers are nearing a deal to send Kawhi Leonard to the Toronto Raptors for Brandon Ingram, Gradey Dick, two first-round picks, one pick swap and two second-rounders, sources told ESPN's Shams Charania on Tuesday.

items.title: If you’re curious the best the Nuggets could do is a vet minimum with a player option for a second year.
items.author: Jake Shapiro
items.body_excerpt:
If you’re curious the best the Nuggets could do is a vet minimum with a player option for a second year.

They *could* with dumping one or two of their top six, offer a taxpayer mid-level which is like $6 million.

So no, LeBron ain’t coming to Denver.
